{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Xyriel Prime
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|A [[Behemoth]] was defeated just outside [[Xyriel Prime]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c31">''The Captain'', chapter 31</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
